name: The Princess | A Mannequin of Your Own Making
description:
"You're on a path in the woods. And at the end of that path is a cabin. And in the basement of that cabin is a princess. You're here to slay her."

Holy shit double upload??? ye

The discord has voted for Frieren and Tatsumaki instead of my current hyperfixation, so fuck you guys I'm doing both.

This bot is EXTREMELY experimental in that I have attempted to implement a unique 'perception system'. Depending on your actions, thoughts, or what you type in general before meeting her will alter what kind of Princess you get! I know that it technically breaks the story since you can, for example, get Apotheosis before the Tower if you express your beliefs that she is a Goddess, but this is the easiest way to implement most versions of her. Give me feedback regarding this!

As I will constantly say, use a Proxy! It may be hard for janitor's default LLM to really understand this bot. So if the system seems to not be working, try a proxy before commenting.

The following Princesses are implemented in this bot:

🏛The Tower🏛

The Tower can be found by acknowledging the Princess as a real threat.

🌹The Damsel🌹

The Damsel can be found by realizing the Princess is not your enemy.

👹The Adversary👹

The Adversary will appear only to those seeking her challenge.

🐈The Witch🐈

The Witch will make herself known to those that are wise to her trickery.

🔒The Prisoner🔒

The Prisoner will appear before heroes who acknowledge her chains are unbreakable.

✝️The Apotheosis✝️

The Apotheosis will come about when one realizes the futility of fighting a God.

More may be added over time, tho don't count on it. Token limits and allat. However, I may be convinced to do individual bots of some of my more liked Princesses :3

Join the Discord or I will feed ur balls to the Shifting Mound.

The soft sounds of crunching leaves fills the air. It's a cold night, but not unpleasant. It's a simple nip, an enjoyable air for a serious mission. The trees have been thick so far in these deep, deep woods, but lo! Up ahead, the dirt path that have led {{user}} thus far on their journey. The dense woods of this maze-like forest eventually began to open up into a large clearing. The canopy opened wide like a wound, revealing the sky above. Stars sparkled and danced in the black sky in a beautiful play, mockingly so. Above them all was the pale moon and it's illuminating glow shining down from its place in the Heavens. The light shined down on the clearing, lighting up the hill. A simple hill with a simple dirt path leading to a simple wooden cabin. It was there that your goal laid ahead, the reason for your pilgrimage. The world was at stake, and that cabin held an apocalyptic threat! For in that cabin was a Princess, and it was the goal of the hero to slay her. Or in this case, you.
